recipe.title: Simple sausage pasta
recipe.description: Add this easy recipe for quick sausage ragù to your repertoire! Bumped up with chickpeas, it's a real crowd-pleaser.

ingredients.name: higher-welfare pork sausages or veggie sausages
fresh or frozen chopped mixed onion

steps.descr: Place a large shallow casserole pan on a medium-high heat
steps.instructions: Place a large shallow casserole pan on a medium-high heat. Squeeze the sausage meat out of the skins into the pan, breaking it up with a wooden spoon and fry until lightly golden, stirring regularly. (If using veggie sausages, roughly slice and fry in 1 tablespoon of olive oil until golden and crispy.)

on_enter.say: Place a large shallow casserole pan on a medium-high heat. Squeeze the sausage meat out of the skins into the pan, breaking it up with a wooden spoon and fry until lightly golden, stirring regularly. (If using veggie sausages, roughly slice and fry in 1 tablespoon of olive oil until golden and crispy.)

steps.descr: Pick and roughly chop the rosemary leaves and peel and...
steps.instructions: Pick and roughly chop the rosemary leaves and peel and finely slice the garlic. Drizzle 1 tablespoon of oil into the pan then add the chopped mixed veg, rosemary and garlic. Season to perfection, then mash everything together with a masher and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until softened.

on_enter.say: Pick and roughly chop the rosemary leaves and peel and finely slice the garlic. Drizzle 1 tablespoon of oil into the pan then add the chopped mixed veg, rosemary and garlic. Season to perfection, then mash everything together with a masher and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until softened.

steps.descr: Pour in the chickpeas, juice and all, and scrunch in the...
steps.instructions: Pour in the chickpeas, juice and all, and scrunch in the tomatoes along with 1 tin’s worth of water, mashing everything up until fine. Bring to the boil, then reduce to a medium-low heat and simmer for 30 minutes, until thick and delicious, mashing everything up with a potato masher.

on_enter.say: Pour in the chickpeas, juice and all, and scrunch in the tomatoes along with 1 tin’s worth of water, mashing everything up until fine. Bring to the boil, then reduce to a medium-low heat and simmer for 30 minutes, until thick and delicious, mashing everything up with a potato masher.

steps.descr: When the sauce has around 12 minutes remaining, cook the...
steps.instructions: When the sauce has around 12 minutes remaining, cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of the starchy cooking water.

on_enter.say: When the sauce has around 12 minutes remaining, cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of the starchy cooking water.

steps.descr: Toss the cooked pasta into the sauce, adding splashes of...
steps.instructions: Toss the cooked pasta into the sauce, adding splashes of the water to loosen if needed, then divide between bowls. Grate over a little Parmesan and drizzle with a little olive oil, if you like, and serve.

on_enter.say: Toss the cooked pasta into the sauce, adding splashes of the water to loosen if needed, then divide between bowls. Grate over a little Parmesan and drizzle with a little olive oil, if you like, and serve.
